mappings.rationaleAI: The political process is the dynamic mechanism through which societies govern themselves.
The functioning of government through elections, policy-making, and administration drives the dynamic political process.
The political process involves the dynamic activities of campaigns, elections, lobbying, and policy-making.
Lincoln's wartime leadership and the Emancipation Proclamation exemplify the dynamics of political process under crisis.
Mandela's transition from prisoner to president exemplifies the dynamics of political reconciliation and democratic transition.
Political parties are key mechanisms in the dynamics of the political process.
Democratic processes shape the dynamics of political participation.
Conservatism shapes the dynamics of the political process.
